0.description: A narrow brick staircase spiraling down. The walls sweat condensation that smells of old cork. Gas lamps flicker at each landing, their mantles glowing a sickly amber. The music grows louder with every step.
0.read_aloud: Twenty steps down. Thirty. The brick gives way to polished marble. The temperature rises. By the time you reach the bottom, you can feel the bass in your teeth.

npcs.name: Emmerich Sable
npcs.dialogue: You can hear it, can't you? I got out three nights ago. Or three years. I can't tell anymore. My hands -- look at my hands. They were steady once. The party takes something from you, but you don't notice until you leave.
npcs.notes: Emmerich escaped but is rapidly aging. He has perhaps days left. He was a guest for what he thought was one evening -- it was eleven years. He can describe the layout and warn about the Host.

event_triggers: An escaped guest reveals the truth: time moves differently inside. The party has been running for decades. Leaving costs you the years the party stole.

1.description: A coat check vestibule. Hundreds of coats hang on brass hooks -- fur stoles, military greatcoats, flapper wraps, modern overcoats. Decades of fashion pressed together. Name tags dangle from each hanger in copperplate script.
1.read_aloud: The coats span generations. You find military dress from the Fairelands Campaign. A debutante's cape from the Century Ball. A leather jacket with a cinema stub in the pocket dated last Thursday. All unclaimed.
1.investigation_success: Declan Voss's coat is here -- a gray wool overcoat with a champagne flute still in the pocket. Inside the lining: a folded invitation on cream paper that reads 'You are cordially invited to the Eternal Revel. Admit one. No departure guaranteed.'

enemies.name: Enthralled Coat-Check Attendant
enemies.notes: A man in a moth-eaten waistcoat, eyes glazed, who insists on taking your coat. Becomes violent if refused. Has been checking coats since 1903.
special: Enthralled: immune to persuasion while the music plays

loot.name: Voss's Invitation
loot.description: Cream card stock, embossed in gold. The ink shimmers faintly with bleed residue.

2.description: A velvet curtain separates the vestibule from the speakeasy proper. Through the gap, golden light spills across the marble floor. The music is intoxicating -- a twelve-piece orchestra playing something that makes your pulse quicken.
2.read_aloud: You pull the curtain aside. The speakeasy opens before you like a wound. Crystal chandeliers. A bar that stretches the length of the room. Dozens of guests laughing, dancing, drinking -- none of them aware that the world above has moved on without them.
2.perception_success: The guests' smiles don't reach their eyes. Their laughter is mechanical, looping. A woman at the bar orders the same drink every ninety seconds, word for word. They're not celebrating. They're trapped.
